content: Name the exact tools, files, and columns you want. Vague prompts get vague results.
Point the agent at a real URL or file instead of asking it to recall facts from memory.
Try the task yourself first, then peek at the hint, and only compare against the known-good prompt at the end.
Even when a server like WorkIQ or SharePoint is connected, call it out by name in the prompt.
Tell the agent to show the script it wrote and its output so you can verify the answer is grounded.
Agents can be steered by text hidden in a page. Review what a page actually asks before you act on it.
